meaning: n.(英国)海陆空军小吃部及小卖部经营机构 海陆空军小吃部(或小卖部)
examples: Before that, she was in the Navy, Army and Air Force Institutes (NAAFI), which ran services such as bars, shops and cafes at British military bases and on board Royal Navy ships.
Katrice disappeared from a shop while her family was buying party food at a NAAFI store in Schloss Neuhaus, near the West German base where her father was stationed as a sergeant in the British Army.
